keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY GENITALS. Genitals : Ag-c., Arn., Calad., Merc., Nit-ac., Pul., Rhus-t., Sep., Sul. Genitals, right : Ap., Calc-c., Caust., Clem., Hep., Lyc., Merc., Nux-v., Pall., Spo., Sul-ac., Ver-a. Genitals, left : Lach., Naj., Pul., Rhod., Thu. Genitals, alternating between : Cimi., Coloc., Lac-c., Lycps., Ol-an., Onos., Rhod. Copyright © Médi-T 1999
